title: Phone & Digital
description: Stay connected: phone calls, messaging, wifi, and everyday digital life in Japanese.
situation: Online and on the phone: making calls, swapping contacts, finding wifi, charging devices, and apps.

phrases.tip: Only used on the phone, never face to face.

phrases.native: 電話番号を教えてください
phrases.english: Please tell me your phone number

phrases.tip: LINE is the dominant messaging app in Japan, like WhatsApp elsewhere.

phrases.native: 充電してもいいですか
phrases.transliteration: juuden shite mo ii desu ka
phrases.pronunciation: joo-den shteh moh ee dess kah

phrases.native: バッテリーが切れそうです
phrases.english: My battery is about to die

phrases.native: 写真を撮ってもいいですか
phrases.transliteration: shashin o totte mo ii desu ka
phrases.pronunciation: shah-sheen oh toht-teh moh ee dess kah
phrases.tip: Always ask before photographing people or inside shops and shrines.

phrases.native: メッセージを送ります
このアプリは便利です
qrコードを読み取ってください
phrases.tip: QR-code payments and menus are everywhere in Japan.
